name: Marcus Rojas
abstract: Marcus Rojas (born February 23, 1963) is an American tubist from New York City.

about_quotes.speaker: Arturo O'Farrill
about_quotes.evidence: I had a little group I think in 1976 that I was playing with, of musicians, Pablo Calogero and I think some other ones from Marcus Rojas and Heyward Peele and we had a little group called The Untouchables.
about_quotes.doc_title: Arturo O'Farrill interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 6, 2024

about_quotes.speaker: Jim Hall
about_quotes.evidence: And the tuba player was great ‘cause he has a “bomp” at the end that I didn’t even write. He said, “That needs another note,” so…
about_quotes.doc_title: Jim Hall — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
